name: iros-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IROS submissions: venue fit against the robotics calendar, PaperPlaza upload audits, the 60-second video attachment, embodied-evidence experiments, double-anonymous review with no rebuttal, the RA-L presentation pathway, and IEEE Xplore camera-ready. Grounded in the official IROS 2026 (Pittsburgh) call for papers, important-dates page, IEEE RAS/RSJ pages, and PaperPlaza, verified 2026-07-09.
